title: Catalog automation — Rich catalog types (shipped)
items: CatalogFnEntry / CatalogSourceEntry — bundle factory + description + configSchema + examples + tags
Backward-compatible GraphSpecCatalog — accepts bare factories or rich entries
generateCatalogPrompt(catalog) — auto-generates LLM prompt text from rich entries
validateSpecAgainstCatalog(spec, catalog) — checks fn/source names, validates config shapes, 'did you mean?' suggestions
compileSpec integration — runs catalog validation before compilation
llmCompose integration — auto-generates prompt from catalog, auto-refine loop on catalog errors (maxAutoRefine option)

title: Wave 2 deliverables (partial)
items: README/landing page rewrite with harness engineering vocabulary
npm keywords + GitHub topics updated: harness-engineering, agent-harness, causal-trace

title: Reactive Collaboration Loop — Wiring (shipped)
items: evalIntakeBridge() — effect parsing EvalResult into per-criterion IntakeItem[], publishes to intake topic
strategyModel() — derived node over completed issues: rootCause × intervention → {attempts, successes, successRate}
priorityScore() — configurable derived using decay() + strategy model + urgency signals
Fast-retry path — conditional edge VERIFY→EXECUTE for self-correctable errors (maxRetries, errorClassifier)
harnessLoop() factory — 7-stage static topology: intake→triage→queue→gate→execute→verify→reflect

Bug fixes: keepalive subscriptions on router+fastRetry effects (COMPOSITION-GUIDE §1 lazy activation), break strategy→triage feedback cycle (sync lookup), null guards on initial activation, assemble full VerifyResult from LLM output + execution context
E2E integration tests: full loop flow, fast-retry path, evalIntakeBridge→harnessLoop integration

Audit all custom equals in PY — no changes needed

Wrap equals errors with node context (PY)

graphProfile and harnessProfile inspection utilities
sizeof memory estimator
router merge via withLatestFrom(triageNode, triageInput) — correct item pairing
item-carried _retries counter replacing fragile baseSummary regex key tracking
global circuit breakers: totalRetries and totalReingestions as state() nodes
trackingKey via relatedTo[0] for stable identity across retries/reingestion
upper-bound clamp on maxTotalRetries (cap 100)
7 new mockLLM scenario tests (happy path, multi-item, retry exhaustion, structural failure, reingestion, gate blocking, harnessProfile)

title: Architecture debt (8.2 rearchitecture)
items: Rearchitect feedback() as graph-visible bridge node (8.2 → 9.0) — replaces subscribe-based shortcut; enables proper DIRTY→DATA two-phase on reentry/counter
Rearchitect funnel() bridges as graph-visible nodes (8.2 → 9.0) — replaces subscribe forwarding; resolves §5.9 imperative trigger violation + teardown leak
stratify two-dep gating (8.2 → 9.0) — gate classification on both source and rules settling

title: Treatment B/C/D unblocked — portable CatalogFnEntry data + Treatment-D templates + contrastive runner wiring
items: evals/lib/portable-catalog.ts — 58 fn entries + 20 source entries with descriptions, configSchema, tags. Sections match manual prompt verbatim so generateCatalogPrompt() output groups identically.

evals/lib/portable-templates.ts — resilientFetchTemplate (canonical resilience nesting: rateLimiter→breaker→retry→timeout→fallback→cache feedback→status) + adaptivePollerTemplate (switchMap-based dynamic interval) with feedback-edge helpers and portableTemplateDescriptions for the LLM prompt
Treatment-D catalog fixes: conditionalMap fn entry (T6 interval-computation gap), median added to aggregate.config.op enum (T8a), llmScore description carries DB-comparison guidance (T11)
EVAL_TREATMENT env var (A|B|C|D) parsed into EvalConfig.catalogTreatment in evals/lib/types.ts

evals/lib/contrastive.ts wired for Treatment B/C/D: builds prompt programmatically via generateCatalogPrompt(portableCatalog); D injects portableTemplates and template-description section; runs validateSpecAgainstCatalog and surfaces errors as judge_scores entries

Test coverage: src/__tests__/evals/portable-catalog.test.ts (16 tests) — shape, prompt generation, catalog validation accept/reject, template inner-fn resolution. All 1718 repo tests pass, lint clean.
